summary: Gift expansion session. Shipped 3 new power-ups on top of the existing gun+multiball, taking the set to FIVE. Introduced a derived-width paddle design (syncPaddleWidth: single source of truth) so timed width changes can never get stuck across expire/life-loss/level-clear. Wide paddle (200px/12s), Slow-Mo (ball dt scaled 0.5x for 8s, paddle stays full-speed), and the Skull — the bad gift (shrink 76px/8s, shrink>wide>base priority so it suppresses & resumes wide). Each gift is a clean drop-in: types union + GIFT_POOL/GIFT_HUE + applyPowerup case + HUD badge + render glyph. Moti playtested live mid-session (screenshot showed gun+wide+multiball all stacked). tsc -b + vite build green throughout. All committed + pushed.
commits: 5430653 feat: skull power-up — the bad gift (5th gift)
open_threads: GIFT_DROP_CHANCE still at 0.38 (elevated playtest value; comment flags normal ~0.18) — decide ship value
Gift pool now 5 at EQUAL weight => ~1-in-5 drops is a skull. Consider weighting (fewer skulls) or per-type drop rates
*.tsbuildinfo tracked in git — could gitignore + untrack
More gift ideas: extra life (instant +1), fireball/piercing, safety net, sticky paddle
No browser tool on Claude side — verification is build + logic + Moti's screenshots, not automated playtest
